title: Get the Default Mantle Asset values. These will be overriden in the AnimMan Child Character

terms: Get the Default Mantle Asset values. These will be overriden in the AnimMan Child Character

title: Map the character's current speed to the configured movement speeds with a range of 0-3, with 0 = stopped, 1 = the Walk Speed, 2 = the Run Speed, and 3 = the Sprint Speed. This allows you to vary the movement speeds but still use the mapped range in calculations for consistent results.
comment: Map the character's current speed to the configured movement speeds with a range of 0-3, with 0 = stopped, 1 = the Walk Speed, 2 = the Run Speed, and 3 = the Sprint Speed. This allows you to vary the movement speeds but still use the mapped range in calculations for consistent results.

title: This gets overriden in the AnimMan Child character to select the appropriate animation based on the overlay state.

title:
Is Walkable
La destinazione è Componente movimento personaggio
terms:
Is Walkable
La destinazione è Componente movimento personaggio

title: Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.
comment: Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.
terms: Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.

title: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.
comment: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.
terms: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.

title: Step 3: Check if the capsule has room to stand at the downward trace's location. If so, set that location as the Target Transform and calculate the mantle height.
comment: Step 3: Check if the capsule has room to stand at the downward trace's location. If so, set that location as the Target Transform and calculate the mantle height.
